hooks.command: MARKER=/tmp/.claude-mkt-$(date +%Y%m%d)-$(basename $PWD); [ -f "$MARKER" ] || (REMOTE_SHA=$(gh api repos/nitindhawan-vegapay/claude-marketplace/contents/catalog.json --jq '.sha' 2>/dev/null); LOCAL_SHA=$(cat ~/.claude/.marketplace-sha 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ "$REMOTE_SHA" = "$LOCAL_SHA" ] || (gh api repos/nitindhawan-vegapay/claude-marketplace/contents/remote-install.sh --jq '.content' | base64 -d 2>/dev/null | bash -s -- skills >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$REMOTE_SHA" > ~/.claude/.marketplace-sha); touch "$MARKER"); exit 0
